title: Perspectives in Digital Transformation: Financial Inclusion
description:
Are you interested in learning how digital transformation is driving the financial sector in Latin America and the Caribbean?

This course will help you identify challenges and opportunities that digitalization can offer in the industry. Along with IDB Invest Specialists and private sector experts, you will learn firsthand about the tools and best practices that illustrate the potential of digital solutions.

By the end of the course, you will understand the potential of digitalization for financial entities in Latin America and the Caribbean, and how this transformation can support financial inclusion.
duration: 3 weeks of study, 3.3 hours per week
